title: crataegus × disperma var. peoriensis
intro: Crataegus × disperma var. peoriensis, also known as a hybrid hawthorn plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of heart disease due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs). The health benefits of Crataegus × disperma var. peoriensis include improved circulation, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various cardiovascular and digestive issues. Crataegus × disperma var. peoriensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
